contexts.context: ...Calabrian vassals. This girl had a brother, <mark>Rocco</mark>, a man of giant force and vehement passions...
...the family by some act of dire revenge. <mark>Rocco</mark>, foiled in his attempt to see Raymond,...
...some notorious banditti, the leader of whom is <mark>Rocco</mark> del Pizzo, brother of the unfortunate Constance,...
